howItWorks.intro: This divorce cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Cost Range
rules.formula: Cost = Base Range × Child Factor × Asset Factor
rules.explanation: Base cost adjusted for custody and asset complexity.

howItWorks.outro: Laws vary by jurisdiction and change frequently. This is not legal advice — consult a licensed attorney.

faq.a: From $500 for simple uncontested to $100,000+ for complex contested cases.
